titleStmt.title: SII 27.82: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 82. (A.R. No. 283 of 1936-37.) PERDŪRU, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up near a field called Garaḍi Kumbalagadde at Vāṇṭyāla.
This is dated Śaka 1328 (1329) current, Vyaya, Bhādrapada śu. 10, Va (i.e. Vaḍḍavāra) corresponding to 1406 A.D., August 24, Tuesday.

It registers a gift of 170 kāṭi-gadyāṇa of Bārakūru derived from the village Beḷaṅji in the veṇṭeya of Kanyāna of Bārakūra-nāḍu made by the king to Śrī Narasiṁha-bhārati of Siṅgēri (Śriṅgēri) for the renovation and proper maintenance of a library (of the maṭha thereat); and out of this, a sum of 20 kāṭi-gadyāṇa was gifted by the Oḍeya of Śriṅgēri (in the form of lands worth the amount, situated at Śivapura) to the Purāṇika Kavi Kṛishṇa-bhaṭṭa of Śriṅgēri, The gift was made with the consent of the jananis of Śivapura as also Bāchappa of Gōve who was governing Bārakūru-rājya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāra
vē trayilōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayā
bhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1328 saṁduyipatta voṁbhattaneya varttamāna
vyaya saṁvatsarada bhādrapada su 10 valu śrīmatu gōveya bācappagaḷu
bārakūra rājyavanāḷuva kāladalli siṁgēriya purāṇika kavi kruṣṇa bhaṭṭari
ge koṭṭa dharma śāsana kramaveṁteṁdaḍe śrīmaṁnmahārājādhi rāja rāja pa
ra mēśvara śrī vīra pratāpa bukkamahārāyaru vijeyanagariya rāja
dhāniyalū rājasiṁhāsanārūḍharāgi sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ rājya
vanu pratipālisuttaṁ baṁddalli siṁgēriya nārasiṁha bhārati voḍeyara
postaka bhaṁḍārada jīrnnōddhāra saṁrakṣaṇārthavāgi bārakūra nāḍa Oḷagaṇa
braṁhāra grāmadiṁ samarppisudu bārakūra kāṭigadyāṇa 170 Akṣā
radalū bārakūra kāṭigadyāṇa nūṟa Eppattu hoṁnasthaḷavanū sarvamā
nyavāgi naḍasi bahudu Eṁdu ge baṁda rāyara rāyasa pramāṇage
Āvara Āgnyānirūpadiṁ Ā brahmāra grāmadalli nūṟa Epattu hoṁna
ḷavanū koṭṭu naḍasutta yidalli Aramaneya haḍalina Ūḷiga muṁtāda
Ellā Ūḷigaū Ā brahmāriṁda naḍeyabēkāgi Ā nūṟa Eppattu hoṁ
ninapratige koṭṭa bārakūranāḍa Oḷagaṇa kaṁnyānadi veṁṭeyada beḷaṁje
ya grāmada Oḷagaṇa Āṟu khaṁḍikada haravarigaḷaṁ koṭṭa bārakūra kā
ṭigadyāṇa 150 Akṣaradalū kāṭigadyāṇa nūṟa Ayivattu hoṁnanuḷi E śu
ddhavāgi kuḍabēkāda yappattu hoṁnanu siṁgēriya Oḍeyaru Ā siṁgēri
ya purāṇika kavi kruṣṇa bhaṭṭarige vṛttiyāgi veya saṁvattarada kārtika su
dha pāḍhya Ārabhyavāgi naḍasi barahēḷida saṁmaṁda Ā siṁgēriya purāṇika
kavikruṣṇa bhaṭṭara Aṁṇaṁdiru kruṣṇabhaṭṭaru śivapuragrāmada teṁ
kaṇa beṭṭinalū nālku mūḍeŪ Oppāne vereya kuḷakke śalavāgi Aramanege te
ttu baha yappattu hoṁnanū Ā siṁgēriya narasiṁha bhārati Oḍeyara nirū
padiṁda Ā siṁgēriya purāṇika kavi kruṣṇa bhaṭṭarige vyaya saṁvatsarada kā
rtika Ārabhyavāgi vṛttiyāgi koṭṭa Ā nālku mūḍeŪ Oppāne vereya ku
ḷakke śalavāgi tettu bahayippattu hoṁnanū madhyasta kruṣṇabhaṭṭaru grā
ma saradiyalū siṁgēriya purāṇika kavi kruṣṇa bhaṭṭarige tettu baha
ru Ā yippattu hoṁnanū teṟuvakṣētra gruhārāmaṁgaḷa catu sīme
ya Oḷaguḷa nidhinikṣēpa jalapāṣāṇa Akṣiṇi Ā gāmasiddha sādhyaṁgaḷeṁba
Aṣṭabhōga tējasvāmyaṁgaḷanū Ā purāṇika kavi kruṣṇabhaṭṭaru taṁma
putra pautra prakṣātra vāgi sarvvabādhā parihrutavāgi Ā(ṁ)caṁdrārkka stā
yi Āgi Eṁdeṁdū sukhadalū bhōgisibahareṁdu koṭṭadharmaśāsana
gōveya bācappagaḷa svahastada Oppa śrī bhārati śrī śrī śrī
yi dharṁmmavanū Ācaṁdrārkka sthāyiyāgi Eṁdeṁdū pālisi naḍasa ba
heveṁdu dharṁmmaśāsanavanū barasikoṭṭa śivapura grāmada samasta jananigaḷa
svahastada Oppa śrī mahādēvaru . dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dānāchrēyō
nu pālanaṁ dānāt svarga mavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . svadattāṁ
paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭivaruṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭā
yāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . narasiṁhabhāratimunikalpita bhū
dēvadharma rakṣārththaṁ Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyisthēyāddharmmānu śāsanaṁ
likhitaṁ . maṁgaḷamahāśrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.82 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
